name: @vendoai-fixtures/existing-agents-e2e
description: Lane E full-journey e2e for the BYO-agent examples: scaffold the fresh framework starter in a temp dir, run the CURRENT `vendo init` for server wiring, apply the example's marked `--- vendo` diff programmatically, boot, and drive a live turn to an actual app creation. Live legs are env-gated (VENDO_LIVE_JOURNEY=1); the marked-diff engine is unit-tested hermetically.
